pi_items.source: Task description explicitly lists these exact text values to be added to the four funnel segments. Verified against task.json description field.
Task description explicitly states: 'Insert a new slide (Slide 2) with the title "Conversion Funnel Q1"'. Verified against task.json description field.
Task description explicitly states: 'Create a funnel diagram using 4 vertically stacked shapes (trapezoids or triangles)'. Verified against task.json description field.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a sales funnel diagram with 4 vertically stacked shapes on slide 2 titled 'Conversion Funnel Q1'. The funnel must contain four text segments with specific values: Inquiries (500), MQL (150), SQL (45), and Closed (12). These represent a realistic B2B sales pipeline with consistent conversion rates of 30%, 30%, and 26.7% respectively. All data is synthetic (example data for a demo task) and hardcoded in the task definition. The shapes must taper in width from top to bottom and have distinct fill colors.
